error_signature: database file size does not change after DELETE
title: SQLite database size not reducing after delete
symptom: After executing a DELETE command on the 'insights_raw' table, the database file size remains unchanged.
root_cause: SQLite does not immediately reduce the file size on disk after a DELETE operation. Instead, it marks the deleted space as empty for future use, which means the file size remains the same until a VACUUM command is executed.
fix_steps: Stop the n8n Docker container to avoid database locking issues.
Run the command 'DELETE FROM insights_raw;' to delete the data.
Execute the command 'VACUUM;' to reclaim the disk space.
agent_instruction: Stop the n8n Docker container, delete data from the insights_raw table, and run VACUUM to reduce the database size.
safety_notes: Take a full database backup before performing these operations.
